title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Angel One in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
